name: ecosystem-acceptance-kit
description: Guided local Evidence creation and revision-pinned ecosystem verification

scripts.check: node --check bin/ecosystem-accept.mjs && node --check lib/bootstrap.mjs && node --check lib/child-process.mjs && node --check lib/demo.mjs && node --check lib/doctor.mjs && node --check lib/evidence-command.mjs && node --check lib/evidence-runtime.mjs && node --check lib/evidence-verifier.mjs && node --check lib/index.mjs && node --check lib/manifest.mjs && node --check lib/onboard.mjs && node --check lib/preflight.mjs && node --check lib/receipt.mjs && node --check lib/rfc3339.mjs && node --check lib/runner.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-secrets.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-package-install.mjs && node --test && pnpm smoke:package
